question: Design a `Playlist` class that contains a dynamically allocated array of `Song` objects. The `Song` class has `title` and `artist`. `Playlist` should manage adding and removing songs (demonstrating composition with dynamic memory).

test_cases.input:
add TitleA;ArtistA
add TitleB;ArtistB
print
remove TitleA;ArtistA
print
add TitleC;ArtistC
print
remove TitleX;ArtistY
print
remove TitleB;ArtistB
print
remove TitleC;ArtistC
print
test_cases.expected:
Playlist:
"TitleA" by ArtistA
"TitleB" by ArtistB
Playlist:
"TitleB" by ArtistB
Playlist:
"TitleB" by ArtistB
"TitleC" by ArtistC
Playlist:
"TitleB" by ArtistB
"TitleC" by ArtistC
Playlist:
"TitleC" by ArtistC
Playlist:
(empty)

test_cases.input:
add First;One
add Second;Two
add Third;Three
print
remove Second;Two
print
add Fourth;Four
print
copy_test
test_cases.expected:
Playlist:
"First" by One
"Second" by Two
"Third" by Three
Playlist:
"First" by One
"Third" by Three
Playlist:
"First" by One
"Third" by Three
"Fourth" by Four
Copied Playlist:
Playlist:
"First" by One
"Third" by Three
"Fourth" by Four
Copied Playlist (modified):
Playlist:
"First" by One
"Third" by Three
"Fourth" by Four
"New Song" by New Artist
Original Playlist (after copy and modification of copy):
Playlist:
"First" by One
"Third" by Three
"Fourth" by Four

test_cases.input:
print
remove Any;Song
add Only;One
print
remove Only;One
print

driver:
std::string command, title, artist; Playlist myPlaylist; while (std::cin >> command) { if (command == "add") { std::cin.ignore(); std::getline(std::cin, title, ';'); std::getline(std::cin, artist); myPlaylist.addSong(Song(title, artist)); } else if (command == "remove") { std::cin.ignore(); std::getline(std::cin, title, ';'); std::getline(std::cin, artist); myPlaylist.removeSong(Song(title, artist)); } else if (command == "print") { myPlaylist.printPlaylist(); } else if (command == "copy_test") { Playlist copiedPlaylist = myPlaylist; std::cout << "Copied Playlist:
"; copiedPlaylist.printPlaylist(); copiedPlaylist.addSong(Song("New Song", "New Artist")); std::cout << "Copied Playlist (modified):
"; copiedPlaylist.printPlaylist(); std::cout << "Original Playlist (after copy and modification of copy):
"; myPlaylist.printPlaylist(); } }
